summary: KOLO PWA UX Improvements Testing Complete - All 8 requested features verified working via Playwright testing
passed_tests: Dashboard stats en haut de la vue Aujourd'hui - Shows 0/3 Tasks, 1 Prospects, 4 To do
FAB central violet - Purple FAB visible at bottom center with data-testid='fab-add-prospect'
FAB ouvre formulaire ajout prospect - Clicking FAB opens Add Prospect form with name, phone, email fields
Cartes de tâches extensibles - Task cards expand when clicked showing task details, contact info
Bouton Call pour tâche appel - Call task shows phone icon for quick call action
Bouton SMS pour tâche sms - SMS task shows message icon + AI sparkle icon
Bouton Email pour tâche email - Email task shows mail icon for quick email action
Pas de bouton action pour Visit - Visit task correctly shows no action buttons (just home icon label)
Heure affichée sur chaque tâche - Times shown: 10:00 AM, 02:00 PM, 04:00 PM, 05:30 PM
Indication 'Overdue' si en retard - All 4 overdue tasks show '(Overdue)' label in yellow/amber
Bouton IA proactif 'Generate AI follow-up' visible sur tâches en retard - Button visible in expanded overdue tasks
Section History sur fiche prospect - Chronological history section visible with timestamps
Labels sous icônes navigation - 'Today' and 'Tasks' labels visible under nav icons
Swipe to complete hint - 'Swipe to complete' text visible above task list

mini_dashboard.details: Stats grid shows Tasks (completed/total), Prospects count, and To do count at top of Today view

fab_central.details: Purple FAB (+) at bottom center opens Add Prospect form with proper fields (name, phone, email, source, status, notes)

expandable_task_cards.details: Task cards expand on click showing: task title, date/time, contact info section, and action buttons

contextual_action_buttons.details: Call→phone icon, SMS→message+AI icons, Email→mail icon, Visit→no action buttons (correct per spec)

task_time_and_overdue.details: Each task shows time (HH:MM AM/PM) and yellow '(Overdue)' badge if past due

proactive_ai_button.details: 'Generate AI follow-up' button visible in expanded overdue tasks with prospect - gradient purple/pink styling

prospect_history_section.details: Chronological History section on prospect detail page shows events with timestamps (Mar 9, 09:47 PM format)

nav_labels.details: 'Today' and 'Tasks' labels visible under navigation icons in bottom nav bar

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 UX improvements implemented correctly in AppShell.js
Task animation keyframes defined in index.css for completion animation
data-testid attributes properly set on key elements (fab-add-prospect, task cards, form inputs)
French locale properly applied to task labels and UI text
seed_data_creation: Test prospect 'Jean Dupont' with 4 different task types (SMS, Call, Email, Visit) was pre-created
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 UX improvements verified: 1) Mini dashboard stats at top of Today view, 2) Central purple FAB opens Add Prospect form, 3) Expandable task cards with details, 4) Contextual action buttons (Call/SMS/Email specific, no buttons for Visit), 5) Time + Overdue indicator on tasks, 6) Proactive AI button on overdue tasks, 7) History section on prospect detail with chronological timeline, 8) Labels under nav icons. Test user: test@test.com / testtest. Test prospect: Jean Dupont with 4 tasks.
